sevenDay.synopsis: IFR cigs will improve by 09L or so. The PM looks VFR, but winds will gust up to 20-22kts. IFR sets up by 22L tonight ahead of an approaching front. Showers are likely and Moderate TS (G35kts) are possible overnight into early tomorrow morning (between periods). Cigs will likely linger into the first portion of tomorrow's AM, and we'll be monitoring for warning-level winds (G30kts). Skies scatter out nicely for the PM, and winds ease up for the N1. Friday and Saturday look easy peasy, but winds pick up again on Sunday as we turn our eyes toward another inbound front. The front will bring showers and ISOLD TS overnight Sunday into early Monday AM.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 11 MAR - 17 MAR
